parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_key = 'leads' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_key = 'calls_booked' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS calls_booked,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_key = 'deals_closed' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS deals_closed,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_key = 'revenue' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_key = 'content_shipped' THEN metric_value ELSE 0 END), 0) AS content_shipped
FROM client_kpis
WHERE
  client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
  AND user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
  AND recorded_date BETWEEN '{{ $json.period_start }}' AND '{{ $json.period_end }}'

SELECT
  logo_url,
  primary_color,
  brand_voice,
  company_name,
  niche
FROM user_ai_config
WHERE user_id = '{{ $('Validate Input').item.json.user_id }}'
LIMIT 1
SELECT system_prompt FROM operator_prompts WHERE component = 'client_reporting_subagent' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO client_reports (
  user_id,
  client_id,
  period_start,
  period_end,
  period_label,
  markdown_payload,
  pdf_url,
  kpi_snapshot,
  status,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.period_start }}',
  '{{ $json.period_end }}',
  '{{ $json.period_label }}',
  '{{ $json.markdown_payload.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.kpis) }}'::jsonb,
  'draft',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, user_id, client_id, period_label, status, created_at
